best_bet.reason: Pure sunny conditions with zero rain and slightly bigger waves at 1 to 3 feet make the Horry County beaches your best play for a full day in the water without any weather interruptions.

counties.name: Horry County
counties.beaches: Myrtle Beach · North Myrtle Beach · Surfside Beach · Garden City
